title: papaver fauriei
intro: Papaver fauriei, also known as the Korean poppy, is a species of poppy native to Korea and the Russian Far East. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and antispasmodic effects, due to its high concentration of alkaloids such as thebaine and codeine. The health benefits of Papaver fauriei include relief from pain, inflammation, and anxiety, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Papaver fauriei include dried flowers, leaves, and roots, which can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
